seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Single-prompt interface to build/host any cloud app/API/service, spin up local LLMs, run always-on agents (Hermes/Claw), integrate cloud storage/DBs, work with Claude/Codex, and scale to billions of agents.
Minimal agent harness that's easy to customize with middleware for building task-specific agent systems.

Open source AI up 500% in 2 months with releases like Gemma 4 12B, Deepseek Flash in production, Kimi 2.6 for coding, Minimax in always-on agents; upcoming GPT 5.6/Gemini 3.5 and major open source drop expected.
100+ plugins for Codex (apps, Figma, Notion, Vercel etc.); ask Codex to analyze your repo/workflow and auto-install/setup relevant ones to boost capabilities without manual selection.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Framework with shared/private memory scopes, trust-aware retrieval, lineage tracking, contradiction resolution; benchmarked for multi-agent collaboration on evolving tasks.
Memory as evolving graph of connections (facts, episodes, skills); dynamically repairs links via task feedback and extracts reusable skills; strong gains on LoCoMo (95.06%) and GAIA (+12.73 pts).
Agent memory with intentional forgetting via TTL to prevent context bloat while retaining useful state.
Portable, onchain, encrypted agent memory independent of providers; typed memories, proofs, cross-platform continuity with MCP/SDK support.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Real-time cost tracking/rollups by workspace/user/API key to manage token spend limits (e.g., Uber's $1500/dev/month cap).
near_misses.reason: More operational tooling than core technical innovation in agents/memory/architecture.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Hundreds of agents for parallel resume tailoring across job postings.
near_misses.reason: Practical application demo rather than new framework or breakthrough technique.

notes: Seed phase yielded limited high-signal technical posts (mostly from @bindureddy, @hwchase17, @reach_vb); global search surfaced strong memory-focused innovations. No posts from other seed experts in window. Selected max 4-6 per category for quality.
